creator: rpz@cse.wustl.edu
text:
Thank you for finding patch fixes for upgrading.  I am fine with the patch.

Best,
Bob

Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of biology/gmap,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/111727 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/111727
>
